name: @parel/sandbox-modal
description: Provides the standard parel.sandbox capability backed by Modal Sandboxes.

config.appName: Modal app name. Defaults to parel-agent.
config.sandboxId: Optional running sandbox id to reconnect.
config.name: Optional running sandbox name to reconnect or assign at creation.
config.destroyOnSessionEnd: Defaults to true. When false, the SDK object is detached.
